stimulus:
The following text is from Tommy Pico's 2017 poem "Nature Poem." The speaker is studying an old portrait.

I could not stop staring at the sepia-toned photograph in a wooden frame. Set upon the bookshelf, it featured a young portrait of my great-grandmother on the day of her marriage.
stem: As used in the text, what does the word "featured" most nearly mean?
rationale:
Choice D is the best answer because the speaker describes a framed photograph sitting on a bookshelf and presenting a portrait of the great-grandmother. "Displayed" means shown or exhibited, which is exactly what the photograph does.

Choice A is incorrect because a photograph does not ask questions. Choice B is incorrect because a photograph does not approve or endorse. Choice C is incorrect because the photograph is plainly visible on the bookshelf, not overlooked.
